steps.title: Identify the key goal
steps.content: The student wants to introduce Kahlo to an unfamiliar audience, so the sentence must establish who she is and her significance — not just describe her artistic style or a specific painting.

steps.title: Match the goal to the answer
steps.content: D opens with her identity and importance (“one of the most influential artists of the twentieth century, Mexican painter”), then states what she's known for (vivid and symbolic self-portraits) — everything an unfamiliar audience needs to understand. The other three skip this foundational information, instead focusing on her style or a specific work. That matches choice D — D is correct.
